engagement_partner.title: Partner
engagement_partner.education: M.S. Accountancy, University of Southern California; B.S. Business Administration, UCLA
engagement_partner.bio: Sarah Keller is a partner in FMT LLP's audit practice and leads the firm's technology industry group. She has over 22 years of experience auditing public and private technology companies, with particular depth in SaaS, cloud infrastructure, and fintech. Sarah has led engagements for clients ranging from pre-IPO startups to publicly traded companies with revenues exceeding $2 billion. Her expertise includes revenue recognition under ASC 606 for software and subscription-based business models, SOC reporting, and cybersecurity compliance. She has extensive experience coordinating with audit committees and presenting findings to boards of directors.
notable_experience: Led audit engagements for over 30 technology companies across SaaS, cloud, and fintech sectors
Managed multi-year integrated audits for three publicly traded technology companies
Significant experience with IPO readiness assessments and S-1 filing support
Specializes in complex revenue recognition for subscription and usage-based models

secondary_engagement_partner.title: Partner
secondary_engagement_partner.education: M.B.A., Columbia Business School; B.S. Accounting, Howard University
secondary_engagement_partner.bio: David Okonkwo is a partner in FMT LLP's audit and advisory practice with 18 years of experience serving technology and professional services companies. He specializes in IT compliance, SOC reporting, and privacy audits, and has led engagements involving complex IT environments including multi-cloud architectures and hybrid infrastructure. David also oversees the firm's cybersecurity audit practice and has deep expertise in SOC 2 Type II examinations. He is known for his ability to translate technical findings into actionable recommendations for management and audit committees.
notable_experience: Led SOC 2 Type II examinations for over 40 technology companies
Oversees FMT LLP's cybersecurity and privacy audit practice
Experienced in auditing complex multi-cloud and hybrid IT environments
Frequent speaker on IT compliance and emerging cybersecurity risks

audit_manager.title: Audit Manager
audit_manager.education: M.S. Accounting, San Jose State University; B.S. Finance, UC Davis
audit_manager.bio: Michelle Tran is an audit manager with nine years of experience in financial statement audits for technology companies. She manages day-to-day engagement execution including planning, fieldwork coordination, staff supervision, and deliverable preparation. Michelle has managed audits for SaaS, fintech, and life sciences clients and has particular expertise in revenue recognition testing, stock-based compensation, and internal control evaluation. She serves as the primary point of contact for client teams during fieldwork.
notable_experience: Managed financial statement audits for over 20 technology and life sciences companies
Expertise in ASC 606 revenue recognition testing for software companies
Experienced in coordinating with external IT specialists for integrated audits
Developed internal training materials on stock-based compensation auditing

audit_senior.title: Audit Senior
audit_senior.bio: James Petrov is an audit senior with four years of experience executing financial statement audits for technology companies. He leads fieldwork teams, performs substantive testing, and prepares workpapers for manager and partner review. James has experience across SaaS, cloud infrastructure, and professional services engagements, with particular strength in cash and revenue cycle testing, accounts receivable confirmation procedures, and IT general controls testing.
notable_experience: Executed fieldwork on over 15 technology company audits
Experienced in testing IT general controls and automated application controls
Performed revenue cycle and accounts receivable testing for subscription-based businesses
Trained and supervised audit associates on engagement procedures
